# `/xp` Command
Adds or removes player experience.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Game Directors</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>Yes</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/xp <amount: int> [player: target]`

### `/xp <amount: int> [player: target]`

## Arguments
- `amount`: int
- `player`: target
